themeVariables.fontFamily: "Noto Sans", "Noto Sans CJK SC", "Source Han Sans SC", "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Hiragino Sans GB", "Avenir Next", "Segoe UI", Arial, sans-serif

themeCSS: .label, .cluster-label, .edgeLabel, .nodeLabel, foreignObject div, foreignObject span, text, tspan { font-family: "Noto Sans", "Noto Sans CJK SC", "Source Han Sans SC", "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Hiragino Sans GB", "Avenir Next", "Segoe UI", Arial, sans-serif !important; }
